description_long: This object is an orange cylindrical prescription medicine bottle with a white, slightly weathered cap and a printed label featuring pharmacy and prescription information. The bottle is accompanied by several red and white capsules scattered around its base, suggesting it contains oral medication. The label includes details such as the pharmacy name, patient name, dosage instructions, and medication type, though some text is partially obscured or illegible. The bottle's surface shows signs of wear and light grime, indicating it has been handled or stored for some time. The cap appears to be a standard child-resistant type, commonly used for prescription bottles. The capsules are two-toned, with a red half and a white half, typical of many over-the-counter or prescription medications.
description: An orange prescription medicine bottle with a white cap and label, surrounded by red and white capsules. The bottle shows signs of wear and has detailed pharmacy information on its label.
description_view_0: The front of the bottle displays the pharmacy label and prescription details, with several red and white capsules lying in front.
description_view_1: The back of the bottle is visible, showing a plain orange surface with no label, and capsules scattered to the left.
description_view_2: The side of the bottle reveals more prescription label text, with a capsule partially visible behind the bottle.
description_view_3: The pharmacy label is clearly visible, showing the pharmacy name and dosage instructions, with capsules arranged to the right.
